log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aarakocra — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aarakocra — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Aarakocra — Iron Concentration HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Aarakocra — Iron Concentration HP: 28/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Aarakocra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 28/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
